query:
SELECT id, name, camera_position, layer_visibility, created_at
        FROM saved_views
        WHERE name LIKE 'render:%'
          AND (
              $1::TEXT IS NULL
              OR layer_visibility->>'status' = $1
          )
          AND (
              $2::UUID IS NULL
              OR camera_position->>'job_id' = $2::TEXT
          )
        ORDER BY created_at DESC
